modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a warm and approachable tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Trouble accessing Adobe Creative Cloud Express

full_description_text:  
El técnico está intentando entrar a Adobe Spark.  
No sabe cómo acceder a Creative Cloud Express.  
Es un poco confuso y necesita ayuda.  
Tal vez hay un problema con la cuenta o algo así.
short_description: Trouble accessing Adobe Creative Cloud Express
